ddls:
CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_detail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the order was placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_detail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size detail */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each product size
Currency in which the order was placed
Unique identifier for each order item
